title: digitaria stentiana
intro: Digitaria stentiana, also known as Dhanicha or Cogongrass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Digitaria stentiana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Digitaria stentiana include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also sometimes used as a food ingredient in some cultures.
